title: Venezuelan Bowl
description: A hearty bowl filled with flavors of Venezuela. This dish is a perfect combination of protein, carbs, and veggies.
instructions: Cook the quinoa according to package instructions.
Warm the black beans in a pan over medium heat.
In a separate pan, heat some oil over medium-high heat.
Add the diced tomato and cook until tender.
Add the cooked black beans to the pan with the tomato.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and lime juice.
Divide the cooked quinoa among four bowls.
Add the black bean and tomato mixture on top of the quinoa.
Garnish with sliced avocado and serve with Venezuelan Bowl Bites on the side.
